title: Coinflip Plugin
description: DollarFlip adds an exciting twist to the classic coin flip game by introducing a currency element.
body:
DollarFlip / CoinFlip

DollarFlip adds an exciting twist to the classic coin flip game by introducing a currency element. Players can now challenge each other in thrilling coin toss battles, putting their dollars on the line for a chance to win big!

How it Works:​

Challenge Opponents: Use the command /cf to initiate a coin flip game with another player. Choose the amount of dollars you're willing to wager.
Flip the Coin: Once both players have entered the game, the plugin flips a virtual coin.
Winner Takes All: The player whose side the coin lands on wins the entire bet, taking home both their own and their opponent's dollars!
Customizable Bets: Players can choose from preset bet amounts like $100, $1000, $10000, and more, ensuring every game suits their risk appetite.
Broadcast Wins: Celebrate your victories! DollarFlip broadcasts the results server-wide, showcasing the triumphs of the lucky winners.
Features:

Realistic Coin Flip: Experience the thrill of a virtual coin toss with DollarFlip's accurate simulation.
Currency Integration: Use in-game dollars as your wager, adding an economic layer to the traditional coin flip game.
Customizable Betting: Choose from a range of betting options to tailor the game to your preferences.
Broadcast Notifications: Share the excitement with the entire server as each game's outcome is announced.
Easy to Use: DollarFlip's intuitive commands make initiating and participating in games effortless.
Whether you're a seasoned gambler or just looking for some high-stakes fun, DollarFlip is the perfect addition to your server's entertainment lineup. Try your luck today!

Commands:
/cf - open menu (/coinflip) you can choose amount
/cf <amount> start - start a game
/cf reload - reload config file (cofinflip.reload)
